creator: nadir@ultel.net
text:
hi. i have problems. i have HP Proliant DL 380 G5 server. when i insert installation cd and boot with ACPI DISABLED MODE my server gives kernel errors.
but its not issues with i386 32bit platform.

CPU: 2 x INTEL XEON 2.5 GHZ (1333 Mhz)
RAM: 10 GB RAM. PC2 5300.
ARRAY: SmartArray P400, 8 SAS DISK, (RAID5+online spare)

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: when boot with ACPI DISABLED MODE
